tweets.text: @statedeptspox: The United States condemns #Nicaragua’s violent response to peaceful Mother’s Day marches yesterday. We continue to urge the Nicaraguan gov't to stop the violence, respect human rights, and create conditions for a peaceful path forward. https://t.co/5VHuLiKOTE

.@State_IRF Ambassador Sam Brownback: The state of #ReligiousFreedom is dire. We have work to do. We must move religious freedom forward -- we must defend it in every corner of the globe. https://t.co/2akFS489TM | Read the
full report: https://t.co/hBwTJ9mHuY https://t.co/w8so2qm67c

.@SecPompeo: Where fundamental freedoms of religion, expression, press & peaceful assembly are under attack, we find conflict, instability & terrorism. On the other hand, governments & societies that champion these freedoms are more secure, stable & peaceful. #ReligiousFreedom https://t.co/8AsH7yaq96

Happening now! Join @State_IRF Ambassador at Large Sam Brownback for a #Facebook Live discussion on international #ReligiousFreedom. Submit questions here: https://t.co/8hMKTC7OZZ https://t.co/J7hISWlszv
Today, @State_IRF Ambassador Sam Brownback addressed reporters at the @ForeignPressCtr on the release of the International #ReligiousFreedom Report for 2017. https://t.co/K7sRskaSEq

.@SecPompeo: #ReligiousFreedom was vital to America’s beginning. Defending it is critical to our future. Religious freedom is not only ours. It is a right belonging to every individual on the globe. https://t.co/8PuIcA7mt0 | Read the report: https://t.co/hBwTJ9mHuY https://t.co/BmRox4bOni

.@State_IRF Ambassador Brownback: For far too many, the state of #ReligiousFreedom is dire. We have to work together to accomplish change. Background Briefing by the Ambassador: https://t.co/IHCCuGgcWd | View the report: https://t.co/hBwTJ9Eimw https://t.co/eWif9kOCQp

Freedom of religion is America’s first freedom. Defending #ReligiousFreedom the world over leads to greater peace, stability and economic prosperity here at home and in the countries that guarantee this freedom. Read @State_IRF Ambassador Brownback’s blog. https://t.co/y657dOOTwh

Promoting and defending #ReligiousFreedom is a priority for this Administration. Here are five things you want to know about this year's International Religious Freedom Report release: https://t.co/1fO6yQRiko | Read the full report: https://t.co/hBwTJ9mHuY @State_IRF

.@State_IRF Ambassador-at-Large Sam Brownback on the 2017 International #ReligiousFreedom Report: “Our goal is to protect the freedom of conscience for all people … We’ve seen some progress. But there’s so much more work to be done.” https://t.co/LSY8eYeBoY

.@SecPompeo announces the first-ever Ministerial to Advance #ReligiousFreedom, to be hosted at the Department of State on July 25-26. This Ministerial will identify concrete ways to push back against persecution and ensure greater respect for religious freedom for all. https://t.co/FxRpP7Eh8B

“Protecting and promoting global respect for #ReligiousFreedom is a priority of @POTUS Administration… we are committed to promoting religious freedom around the world – both now and in the future.” - @SecPompeo https://t.co/V3pR3Foklg

.@SecPompeo: What has the Iranian Revolution given to the Iranian people? The regime reaps a harvest of suffering and death in the Middle East at the expense of its own citizens. https://t.co/HaWijYhwrd #PompeoAtHeritage https://t.co/klckxL0br1

.@SecPompeo: We’ll cont. to work with allies to counter the regime’s destabilizing activities in the region, block their financing of terror & address #Iran’s proliferation of missiles. We will ensure Iran has no path to a nuclear weapon. https://t.co/HaWijYz7PN #PompeoAtHeritage https://t.co/msxxmWFVF6

.@SecPompeo: No more wealth creation for Iranian kleptocrats. No more acceptance of missiles landing in Riyadh and in the Golan Heights. No more cost-free expansions of Iranian power. No more. https://t.co/ET5MtLndIW #PompeoAtHeritage https://t.co/4Zk8Zzbuwj
This morning, @SecPompeo delivered remarks with Georgian Prime Minister @KvirikashviliGi at the 2018 Plenary Session of the U.S.-#Georgia Strategic Partnership Commission. https://t.co/OzYhEraIXe

.@SecPompeo: It is America’s hope that our labors toward peace & security will bear fruit for the long-suffering people of #Iran. We long to see them prosper & flourish as in decades past, and as never before. Today, the #USA is proud to take a new course towards that objective. https://t.co/Yw3Wv3W25P

.@SecPompeo: Next year marks 40th anniversary of Islamic Revolution in #Iran. At this milestone we have to ask: what has Iranian Revolution given the Iranian people? The regime reaps a harvest of suffering & death in the Middle East at expense of its own people. #PompeoAtHeritage https://t.co/1astzYkrlf

.@SecPompeo: In the strategy we are announcing today, we want the support of our most important allies & partners in region & around globe. We welcome any nation which is sick & tired of the nuclear threats & brutality of a regime at peace w/ inflicting chaos on innocent people. https://t.co/eY0pbe7LCI
.@SecPompeo: Any new deal must begin with defining what the world should demand from #Iran...America did not create this need for changed behavior, Iran did. #PompeoAtHeritage https://t.co/wr9w0ifLcl

.@SecPompeo: As seen from the hijab protests, the brutal men of the regime seem to be particularly terrified by Iranian women who are demanding their rights. As human beings with inherent dignity & inalienable rights, the women of #Iran deserve same freedoms the men of Iran have. https://t.co/mqbE8vPwpv

.@SecPompeo: We will ensure freedom of navigation on the waters in the region. We will track down Iranian operatives and their #Hezbollah proxies operating around the world and crush them. #Iran will never again have carte blanche to dominate the Middle East. #PompeoAtHeritage https://t.co/fPNzZyPgr5

.@SecPompeo: The sting of sanctions will only grow more painful if regime does not change course from the unacceptable & unproductive path it has chosen for itself and the people of #Iran. These will be the strongest sanctions in history by the time we are done. #PompeoAtHeritage https://t.co/TYmWQLiuNq

.@SecPompeo: We will cont. to work w/our allies to counter the regime’s destabilizing activities in the region, block their financing of terror & address #Iran’s proliferation of missiles. We will also ensure Iran has no possible path to a nuclear weapon – ever. #PompeoAtHeritage https://t.co/hrWlrVfRPt

.@SecPompeo: #IRGC has flown armed drone into Israeli airspace & launched salvos of rockets into Golan Heights from #Syria. Our steadfast ally #Israel has asserted its sovereign right of self-defense in response, a stance US will cont. to unequivocally support. #PompeoAtHeritage https://t.co/AF0ItNBiPP

.@SecPompeo: #IRGC has cont. to pump thousands of fighters into Syria to prop up the murderous Assad regime...Iran perpetuates a conflict that has displaced more than 6 million Syrians inside the country and over 5 million to seek refuge outside its borders. #PompeoatHeritage https://t.co/Iokl0LcrJv

.@SecPompeo: #JCPOA permitted the Iranian regime to use money from the JCPOA to boost the economic fortunes of a struggling people. The regime’s leaders refused to do so. Instead the govt. spent its newfound treasure fueling proxy wars across the Middle East. #PompeoAtHeritage https://t.co/05rpdXHESd

.@SecPompeo: #JCPOA put world at risk b/c of its fatal flaws. The weak sunset provisions of JCPOA merely delayed #Iran’s nuclear weapons capability. After countdown clock ran out on the deal’s sunset provisions, Iran would be free for a quick sprint to the bomb. #PompeoAtHeritage https://t.co/zn2N8tB287

.@SecPompeo: @POTUS withdrew from the deal for a simple reason: it failed to guarantee the safety of the American people from the risks created by the leaders of the Islamic Republic of #Iran. #PompeoAtHeritage https://t.co/lSzYDn8CUc
